subject: allow destination reads for replacements
command: benchmark-assets with mixed profile at 1024 MiB
evidence: Rust benchmark completed cold create, forced unchanged update, sparse update, prune update, and destroy. Sanitized counters show 443 uploaded on create, 443 skipped unchanged, 7 uploaded and 436 skipped on sparse update, 398 uploaded and 45 deleted on prune update.
notes: First attempted sparse/prune update exposed missing destination s3:GetObject permission; rerun passed after fix. Raw logs retained only in scratch.
